fields.name: Crystal Love Bangle Bracelet
fields.description: Crystal Love Bangle Bracelet, a stainless steel, gold-plated bracelet, beautifully adorned with crystals, adds an exquisite touch of elegance to your casual fits.

fields.name: Plain Stackable Bangle Bracelet
fields.description: Your everyday essential, made to stack. The Plain Stackable Bangle Bracelet (4MM) is crafted in stainless steel and available in 18k gold tone, rose gold jewellery finish, or bold black PVD.

fields.name: Cute Heart Bracelet
fields.description: A sweet and dainty bracelet featuring a delicate heart charm that symbolizes love and warmth. Crafted with a fine chain and polished to shine, this piece blends elegance with durability.

fields.name: Evil Eye Bracelet
fields.description: A symbol of protection with a refined crystal glow. The Evil Eye Bracelet is crafted in stainless steel with a sleek rhodium plated finish, featuring a delicate evil eye accented blue

fields.name: Small Heart Hoop Earrings
fields.description: The Small Heart Hoop Earrings are a sweet blend of elegance and charm, designed in a classic hoop silhouette with delicate heart accents. Crafted from durable stainless steel

fields.name: Solitaire Drop Hoop Earrings
fields.description: Bold hearts, made to stand out. The Chunky Heart Hoop Drop Earrings are crafted in stainless steel and finished in a rich 18k gold tone, featuring an oversized heart drop that makes an instant .

fields.name: Pearl Drop Diamond Earrings
fields.description: Elevate your style with our classic gold-plated earrings, a timeless accessory that exudes sophistication and effortless glamour. Crafted with a lustrous gold-plated finish.

fields.name: Emerald Drop Hoop Earrings
fields.description: A pop of green, made to captivate. The Emerald Drop Hoop Earrings are crafted in stainless steel and finished in a rich 18k gold tone, featuring vibrant green stones that add depth and colour.

fields.name: Hearts All Over Bracelet
fields.description: The Hearts All Over bracelet features dainty heart charms crafted to add an accent of refinement to everyday wear. It's tarnish-resistant, stainless steel material makes it as reliable as pretty.

fields.name: Infinity Charm Chain Bracelet
fields.description: A delicate bracelet featuring the infinity symbol, crafted in a radiant finish to represent endless love and positivity. Lightweight and durable, it offers comfort with a sleek clasp for easy wear..

fields.name: Classic Textured Hoops
fields.description: Elegant and versatile, these 18k gold tone plated classic textured hoops feature subtle detailing that adds a refined touch to any outfit. The polished gold finish ensures lasting shine,.

fields.name: Plain Ball Stud Earrings
fields.description: Sleek and timeless, these 18k gold plated plain ball stud earrings are perfect for everyday elegance. Minimal yet versatile, they add a subtle shine to any outfit while remaining comfortable.

fields.name: Round Solitaire Necklace
fields.description: The Round Solitaire Necklace radiates timeless elegance with its sparkling cubic zirconia pendant. Crafted in stainless steel with a radiant 18k gold tone, this waterproof and anti-tarnish necklace.

fields.name: Classic Emerald Necklace
fields.description: The Classic Emerald Necklace features a vibrant green emerald pendant set on a sleek 18k gold-tone chain, exuding elegance and sophistication. Crafted in stainless steel with a durable gold finish.

fields.name: Delicate Diamond Studded Necklace
fields.description: Timeless and radiant, this necklace features a sparkling white cubic zirconia pendant in a radiant gold-tone finish. Its minimalist design adds subtle elegance to any outfit, perfect for everyday.

fields.name: Bow Pendant Necklace
fields.description: A touch of gold makes every day graceful. Our Bow Pendant Necklace captures feminine elegance with modern minimalism. Perfect necklaces for women and gold-plated jewellery, it adds a sculptural.

fields.name: Tree of Life Necklace
fields.description: Symbolic, elegant, and thoughtfully designed, the Tree of Life Necklace features a shimmering white cubic zirconia-embellished pendant in a radiant gold-tone finish. Its intricate motif adds meaning.

fields.name: Gilded Rings Layered Necklace
fields.description: Some layers bring elegance to your look without even trying. The Gilded Rings Layered Necklace features two delicately balanced chains, each anchored with sleek, interlocking ring charms.
